stubMarker: // STUB: not yet implemented. Scaffolded from the declared file-system body contract.

domainContract.domainSummary: LogMe observes a configured workspace, inventories local executable domain methods, detects method testimony, rejects silent or generic in-repo code, and renders a sterility report with proof.
laws: No dark executable code in the repo.
No generic utility code in the domain body.
No helper methods hiding local meaning.
No local executable method without LogMe.
No local executable method outside the declared domain vocabulary.
No unimplemented stub reported as domain-bound code.
domainContract.cleanFindingsLabel: _No findings. The domain body is sterile._

genericUtilityDetected.reason: generic mechanics belong in a package, not the domain body

methodWithoutTestimony.reason: local domain executable code must testify with LogMe

anonymousExecutableMethodDetected.reason: a local executable method was discovered without a domain-bearing name

methodNameOutsideDomainVocabulary.reason: a local executable method is named with generic or mechanical language instead of the declared domain vocabulary

unimplementedStubDetected.reason: the file is a scaffolded stub and has not been implemented yet

retiredDomainNameReintroduced.reason: the retired experimental domain name logme2 was reintroduced; the correct domain name is logme
